parameters.name: maxProgress
parameters.notes: The maximum amount of progress that can be stored on the ability.

parameters.name: progressPerUse
parameters.notes: The amount of progress used every time the ability is activated.

parameters.name: iconImage
parameters.notes: An optional rbxassetid of the image that will be shown on the button for the ability. . UseAbility (function (event) if (event . abilityName == " yeehaw ") then AnnouncementService . sendAnnouncement (" YEEHAW! ") end end) -- Create a "yeehaw" ability that is activated with the X key -- The ability has 2 stacks of "yeehaw" local abilityConfig = { maxProgress = 10, progressPerUse = 5 iconImage = ".

parameters.name: rbxassetid
parameters.notes: " } AbilityService . createAbility (" yeehaw ", KeyCode . X, abilityConfig) -- Add the ability to the host AbilityService . enableAbility (MatchService . getHost (), " yeehaw ").

examples.description: Create a "yeehaw" ability that is activated with the X key
examples.code:
Events.UseAbility(function (event)
    if (event.abilityName == "yeehaw") then
        AnnouncementService.sendAnnouncement("YEEHAW!")
    end
end)

-- Create a "yeehaw" ability that is activated with the X key
-- The ability has 2 stacks of "yeehaw"
local abilityConfig = {
    maxProgress = 10, 
    progressPerUse = 5
    iconImage = "rbxassetid://7193644599"
}
AbilityService.createAbility("yeehaw", KeyCode.X, abilityConfig)

-- Add the ability to the host
AbilityService.enableAbility(MatchService.getHost(), "yeehaw")

parameters.name: placedByUserId
parameters.notes: The Roblox user ID of the player who placed the block (may not exist if placed by the server).

functions.name: getPlayer
functions.notes: Returns the player playing as this entity. If this entity is an NPC (like a Creature) this will return nil.

functions.name: getHealth
functions.notes: Returns current health of the entity.

functions.name: getMaxHealth
functions.notes: Returns max health of the entity.

functions.name: isAlive
functions.notes: Returns true if the entity is alive.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.notes: Returns the current position of the entity.

functions.name: setPosition
functions.notes: Sets the position of the entity.

functions.name: getCFrame
functions.notes: Returns the current CFrame of the entity.

functions.name: setCFrame
functions.notes: Sets the CFrame of the entity.

functions.name: setMaxHealth
functions.notes: Sets the max health of the entity.

functions.name: setCustomName
functions.notes: Sets a custom display name on the entity's healthbar.

functions.name: destroy
functions.notes: Destroys the entity.

examples.code:
Events.BlockPlace(function(event)
    local entity = event.player:getEntity()
    if not entity then
        return
    end
    entity:setPosition(event.position + Vector3.new(0,3,0))
end)

functions.name: setCooldown
functions.notes: Sets the cooldown of the generator (in seconds). This is how many seconds passes in-between item drops. Defaults to 20 seconds.

functions.name: setItem
functions.notes: Sets the type of item that is dropped by the generator.

functions.name: setMax
functions.notes: Sets the max stack size that the generator can hold. Once the max stack size is reached, no more items will be generated until the items are picked up. Defaults to 10.

functions.name: setPosition
functions.notes: Sets the position of the generator.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.notes: Returns the position of the generator.

functions.name: dropItem
functions.notes: Immediately drops an item from the generator.

functions.name: destroy
functions.notes: Destroys the generator.

methods.name: setCooldown
methods.notes: Sets the cooldown of the generator (in seconds). This is how many seconds passes in-between item drops. Defaults to 20 seconds.

methods.notes: Sets the max stack size that the generator can hold. Once the max stack size is reached, no more items will be generated until the items are picked up. Defaults to 10.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.notes: Sets the position of the generator.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.notes: Returns the position of the generator.

methods.name: dropItem
methods.notes: Immediately drops an item from the generator.

methods.name: destroy
methods.notes: Destroys the generator.

Knockback.description: Configuration object for knockback applied during damage events.

parameters.name: fromPosition
parameters.notes: The position from which knockback should be applied. If this is equal to the position of the hit entity, no knockback will be applied.

parameters.name: horizontal
parameters.notes: The amount of horizontal knockback applied. Defaults to 1. A value of 0 will apply no horizontal knockback.

parameters.name: vertical
parameters.notes: The amount of vertical knockback applied. Defaults to 1. A value of 0 will apply no vertical knockback.

examples.description: All damage events launch the hit entity into the air with no damage
examples.code:
-- All damage events launch the hit entity into the air with no damage
Events.EntityDamage(function(event)
    event.damage = 0
    event.knockback.horizontal = 0.5
    event.knockback.vertical = 5
    event.knockback.fromPosition = event.entity:getPosition() - Vector3.new(0,3,0)
end)

examples.description: Cancels knockback for all damage events
examples.code:
-- Cancels knockback for all damage events
Events.EntityDamage(function(event)
    event.knockback.horizontal = 0
    event.knockback.vertical = 0
end)

functions.name: getKeys
functions.notes: Returns the keys of the leaderboard.

functions.name: addKey
functions.signature: leaderboard:addKey(key: Player | Team | string, initialScore: number | nil)
functions.notes: Adds a new key to the leaderboard of the given type. You can optionally give the key an initial score, which otherwise defaults to zero.

functions.name: removeKey
functions.notes: Removes the key from the leaderboard.

functions.name: addScore
functions.signature: leaderboard:addScore(key: Player | Team | string, amount: number)
functions.notes: Adds the given amount to the current score of the key.

functions.name: subScore
functions.signature: leaderboard:subScore(key: Player | Team | string, amount: number)
functions.notes: Subtracts the given amount from the current score of the key.

functions.name: setScore
functions.signature: leaderboard:setScore(key: Player | Team | string, amount: number)
functions.notes: Sets the score of the key to the given amount.

functions.name: getScore
functions.signature: leaderboard:getScore(key: Player | Team | string): number | nil
functions.notes: Returns the current score of the key. Returns nil if the key is not part of the leaderboard.

functions.name: getPlace
functions.signature: leaderboard:getPlace(place: number): Player | Team | string | nil
functions.notes: Returns the key located at the place. Returns nil if there is no key at the place.

functions.name: clear
functions.notes: Clears all leaderboard entries.

methods.name: getKeys
methods.notes: Returns the keys of the leaderboard.

methods.name: addKey
methods.signature: leaderboard:addKey(key: Player | Team | string, initialScore: number | nil)
methods.notes: Adds a new key to the leaderboard of the given type. You can optionally give the key an initial score, which otherwise defaults to zero.

methods.name: removeKey
methods.notes: Removes the key from the leaderboard.

methods.name: addScore
methods.signature: leaderboard:addScore(key: Player | Team | string, amount: number)
methods.notes: Adds the given amount to the current score of the key.

methods.name: subScore
methods.signature: leaderboard:subScore(key: Player | Team | string, amount: number)
methods.notes: Subtracts the given amount from the current score of the key.

methods.name: setScore
methods.signature: leaderboard:setScore(key: Player | Team | string, amount: number)
methods.notes: Sets the score of the key to the given amount.

methods.name: getScore
methods.signature: leaderboard:getScore(key: Player | Team | string): number | nil
methods.notes: Returns the current score of the key. Returns nil if the key is not part of the leaderboard.

methods.name: getPlace
methods.signature: leaderboard:getPlace(place: number): Player | Team | string | nil
methods.notes: Returns the key located at the place. Returns nil if there is no key at the place.

methods.name: clear
methods.notes: Clears all leaderboard entries.

MatchState.description: Object describing the different match states.

value_notes.PRE: Before the host/player starts the match.
value_notes.RUNNING: After the match has been started and is currently running.
value_notes.POST: After the match has ended, whether by host action or game flow.

functions.name: getEntity
functions.notes: Returns the entity this player is controlling if one is active.

functions.name: setScale
functions.notes: Resize player by provided multiplier. For example a scale of 2 would make the player twice as big (default player scale is 1).

functions.name: registerSpeedMultiplier
functions.notes: Registers a speed multiplier for the player. A multiplier of 1 is equal to normal speed, less than 1 is slower than normal speed, and greater than 1 is faster than normal speed. A multiplier value of 2 would be equivalent to double the normal speed of the player. The id parameter can be any string you wish to use to reference the multiplier.

functions.name: registerAdditionalAirJumps
functions.notes: Registers additional air jumps for the player. The default air jump count is 0. Air jumps are jumps performed while already in the air. The id parameter can be any string you wish to use to reference the registered air jump change.

functions.name: registerJumpHeightMultiplier
functions.notes: Registers a jump height multiplier for the player. A multiplier of 1 is equal to normal height (2 block high jump), less than 1 is shorter than normal height, and greater than 1 is higher than normal height. A multiplier value of 2 would be equivalent to double the normal jump height of the player. The id parameter can be any string you wish to use to reference the multiplier.

functions.name: removeSpeedMultiplier
functions.notes: Removes the speed multiplier with the given id from the player.

functions.name: removeAdditionalAirJumps
functions.notes: Removes the additional air jumps with the given id from the player.

functions.name: removeJumpHeightMultiplier
functions.notes: Removes the jump height multiplier with the given id from the player.

methods.name: getEntity
methods.notes: Returns the entity this player is controlling if one is active.

methods.name: setScale
methods.notes: Resize player by provided multiplier. For example a scale of 2 would make the player twice as big (default player scale is 1).

methods.name: registerSpeedMultiplier
methods.notes: Registers a speed multiplier for the player. A multiplier of 1 is equal to normal speed, less than 1 is slower than normal speed, and greater than 1 is faster than normal speed. A multiplier value of 2 would be equivalent to double the normal speed of the player. The id parameter can be any string you wish to use to reference the multiplier.

methods.name: registerAdditionalAirJumps
methods.notes: Registers additional air jumps for the player. The default air jump count is 0. Air jumps are jumps performed while already in the air. The id parameter can be any string you wish to use to reference the registered air jump change.

methods.name: registerJumpHeightMultiplier
methods.notes: Registers a jump height multiplier for the player. A multiplier of 1 is equal to normal height (2 block high jump), less than 1 is shorter than normal height, and greater than 1 is higher than normal height. A multiplier value of 2 would be equivalent to double the normal jump height of the player. The id parameter can be any string you wish to use to reference the multiplier.

methods.name: removeSpeedMultiplier
methods.notes: Removes the speed multiplier with the given id from the player.

methods.name: removeAdditionalAirJumps
methods.notes: Removes the additional air jumps with the given id from the player.

methods.name: removeJumpHeightMultiplier
methods.notes: Removes the jump height multiplier with the given id from the player.

examples.description: Set all player speeds to 2 times normal speed for 30 seconds
examples.code:
-- Set all player speeds to 2 times normal speed for 30 seconds
-- Set all players to have 1 air jump
for i, player in ipairs(PlayerService.getPlayers()) do 
    player:registerSpeedMultiplier("speed-boost", 2)
    player:registerAdditionalAirJumps("bounce", 1)
    task.wait(30)
    player:removeSpeedMultiplier("speed-boost")
end

functions.name: onActivated
functions.notes: Registers a function to run when the prompt is activated.

functions.name: setObjectText
functions.notes: Sets the object text. Example: Door.

functions.name: setActionText
functions.notes: Sets the action text. Example: Open.

functions.name: setActivationDistance
functions.notes: Sets the activation distance in studs. Only players within this distance can use the prompt.

functions.name: setHoldDuration
functions.notes: Sets the duration (in seconds) of hold time needed to activate the prompt.

functions.name: setKeyCode
functions.notes: Specifies the key code used to activate the prompt. Written as KeyCode.X .

functions.name: setPosition
functions.notes: Sets the position of the prompt.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.notes: Returns the position of the prompt.

functions.name: destroy
functions.notes: Destroys the prompt.

methods.name: destroy

functions.name: setColor
functions.notes: Sets the fill color of the progress bar.

functions.name: setMaxProgress
functions.notes: Sets the max progress for the progress bar.

functions.name: setText
functions.notes: Sets a text label on the progress bar.

functions.name: get
functions.notes: Returns the current progress of the progress bar. For example, a progress bar that has 1 unit of progress with a maximum of 5 units would return 1 .

functions.name: add
functions.notes: Adds the given amount to the current progress.

functions.name: sub
functions.notes: Subtracts the given amount from the current progress.

functions.name: set
functions.notes: Sets the progress to the given amount.

functions.name: addPlayer
functions.notes: Adds a player to the list of players who can view this progress bar.

functions.name: removePlayer
functions.notes: Removes a player from the list of players who can view this progress bar.

functions.name: destroy
functions.notes: Removes the progress bar.
